name: Hagihara Industries Inc.
summary: Hagihara Industries Inc. manufactures and sells flat yarns and relevant machinery in Japan. Its Plastics Business division offers PE tarpaulin, blue sheet, insulation fabrics, transparent fabrics, flame retardant fabrics, mesh products, soundproof clothing, water tank lining, heavy duty shelter fabric, radon and methane prevent fabric, ground barrier clothing, sandbags, adhesive tapes, meltac clothing, and monofilaments and yarns. The company's Engineering Products division offers duplex, sectional drive, narrow width, paper, and other slitter rewinders, as well as slitter rewinders with laminating units; inspection rewinders; yarn winders, such as automatic yarn changeover, take-up, traverse, and roving winders; and plastic recycling machines and water ring type hot cut pelletizers. Hagihara Industries Inc. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Kurashiki, Japan.
